column1: 2 AM UPDATE | Debby has winds at 80 mph. Landfall is expected within the next 4 hours along the Taylor/Dixie County coastline. Extremely heavy rains continue in bands here in Tampa Bay with widespread flash flooding.

The frogs are loving this weather! I hear them out back, from my bedroom.
Right now they are louder than the rain.
It’s a little drizzle and little wind now. Spring Hill.
i am hearing them too..I thought first were ducks 🤔
me too!
same here they’re singing all night
Here too Brooksville
🤦🏼‍♀️ That's cuz they're making whoopie 😂
Debby went from little Debbie to giving Florida a Big Debby.
I have damages and a tree top is on my neighbors car
I feel for y'all. These storms that are shooting through the gap and rapidly intensifying near land are a different breed of hurricane!
Great I have 3 feet of water this is insane! I’m forth generation Floridian and I’m done this is too much. Ian ruin my home now this… my car is run I’ve my home is ruined I’m done
Thanks for the update Denis …. Can’t sleep. Crazy rains here in LWR winds don’t seem too bad .. some flashes of lightening ☔️
So much rain here in LWR! Could not sleep!
LWR? Not familiar with abbreviation....?
Lakewood Ranch is in Sarasota/Bradenton.
same, can’t really sleep!
same here in Bradenton

Thank you Denis Phillips !!
This is a long storm 😪
it really is. It keeps slowing down and sounding cal, but then it is pouring and loud, scary wind.
I wonder how many Dr. PEPPERS He has drank? Lol
Thanks for the update. Scary wind here in Brooksville.
Very loud wind and heavy rains all evening and continuing here south of Downtown St. Pete.
yes! I’m close to Papa Joes and it’s crazy here with the wind!
Brooksville too- I am the only one awake in my house and the winds woke me from a deep sleep!
just woke me up too!
it wasn’t this bad during daylight this is scary
yeah darkness and storms are frightening mix! I have a horse and I can’t see him. (I ain’t going out right now! Lol)
I hope he’s okay
here in Ocala it's really nasty winds and rain too

I am in Riverview, and at 3 a.m still, there's a thunderstorm with heavy rain and strong winds pounding at my windows. It’s hard to sleep with all the gusting wind and rain. I'm praying for everyone up north in the path of Debbie.

Thank you for the update! Just lost power in Old Town, Dixie County. Scary noisy out there. Rain and wind and branches hitting the house. I pray for nothing worse. No update on the weather channel page. They talk about our area like we don't exist. All about Cedar Key and I pray they are ok.
it’s ridiculous , like the Hatch and Poor Horseshoe and Suwannee are just rebuilding from last August. I feel so bad for the folks in Dixie and Taylor counties
hope all is ok with you guys RoRo. Be safe
thanks Jane. We have no power and a big mess but escaped being hit by a tree again at least for now. Still raining and windy.
power out here in Cross City did the hurricane 🌀 make land.and where?
Thanks for being the best out there. You're the GOAT!!

Still jammin in myakkacity ...lots of thunder , lightening , pouring rain and wind it's 2:30am ...I don't think it's gonna slow for us for several more hours ...prayers to everyone in the path in north Florida 🙏🙏
Got woke up by a crazy wind gust at 5:05am over here.
I didn go to bed till after 6am cuz there was so many tornado threats coming ...those tornadoes scare me bad ...
I had to force myself to get some sleep. Do you guys have much flooding where you are?

there's a ton of flooding out in Myakka but thank fully not to bad at my property ...yes there's standing water but it's gone down Alot ..I didn like being stranded out here lol they shut 70 and 64 off so for 24 hrs I cudn come toward town if I wanted to .

that’s good. As long as the sun keeps shining, you guys should be dried out soon.
I can only imagine being stranded. That’s always when you really want to go too. 😜
I know right lol
Didn't get much sleep in Clearwater. It would quiet down just enough for me to start drifing off to sleep then loudly hammer us again.
The winds just picked up majorly in Plant City!
I’ve gotten about 8” rain so far according to my weather station. Max wind 35. By 60 and Turkey Creek.
just lost power here in PC. Looks like a lot of Plant City is without power now.
Up to 10.26” now.
it’s been a bit wild in Lakeland too
It all got scary for quite a while but calmed and now it's starting again! 😭 I just want it to stop! I heard a huge crash outside and I'm not going out there!
what part of pc
I'm in plant city as well it's picking up alot.
And so did the hotel
Mine was knocked out a few times but came back on.
You went to a hotel and it lost power too? 😱I would expect them to have generators
Working on the top floor of a building in Tampa tonight and the wind has been rumbling our entire unit all night! It’s so loud! We are finally just now having some quiet time.

Rain is crazy here in FishHawk! I've lowered the water in my pool twice at least 8" each time. I put an empty bucket out when it started raining yesterday I'm curious to see how full it is when the rain stops. Thank you for keeping us informed 👍
5 am update, it's still raining buckets! Had to lower the pool again, (just lowered it at 1:30)
But it was overflowing again!
Stay safe everyone.
hi neighbor. I've measured 9" of rain since 5pm
please share when you measure.
I will!

Driving home from Pensacola around 4pm: (live in Port Richey)
Drive is a straight shot but want to be cautious of floods and heavy rains.

Heavy rain and shore power lost in Branford (Suwannee county) at 0300. Pretty good wind gusts. Lots of Idalia feels. Glad we run on solar with house battery back ups here at Livin’ Like Larry Farm Sanctuary. All sanctuary residents doing well💕🐾
Glad you made it safe! Took my sister to the high speed train she didn’t want to fly!
Thank you so much Denis Phillips! I feel so calm when I listen to you report our storms, no hype just facts and some good times with all the staff at ABC. Bless you all!!
Thank you for updates. Anything on Jacksonville?? Be safe everyone
What are the wind gusts in E Bradenton?? It’s crazy!

I keep seeing flashes of lightening but I haven’t really heard thunder.
I would be worried too, it’s hard when our babies are far away and can’t just call to tell us. 💗💗💗
But it definitely isn’t as bad as Ian or Irma. Wind wise. The water is a lot though. You stay safe as well! Try to rest x

they’re not scary bad (I’m on the cusp of manatee and Sarasota county).
Scary bad being as bad as Ian! I watched Ian winds work all my 15+ yr old trees into almost the ground from the back and forth wind.
Rn the wind is strong, but not that strong! The rain is a lot tho, volume wise. But we (me) still have power. Hugs mama. She should be okay xx
the storm has been so loud and intense tonight!
it’s just nonstop wind/rain. I’m sure she’s ok.
I’ve been wondering the same. 💨 💨 💨

all the roads around my neighborhood are flooded. I’ve never seen my street be flooded like it is!
But last night the wind sound was crazy so I would love to see those numbers .
yep. Same here with the winds last night. Nothing like what we experienced with the previous “I storms” in the last 7 years but still fairly strong winds nonetheless.
she’s in a safe brick and mortar building so she should be fine. It’s the wind gust and the tornadoes that are scary.
Yes haw...just landed in Tampa from Chicago at 3am. Bumpy for sure but nothing too crazy. Glad to be on the ground.

Still have power in Largo!!! Haven't gone outside but no flooding I can detect thankfully. Sounds like wind/rain has calmed somewhat. Thanks Denis Phillips for keeping us informed constantly. You are the BEST!!!
still have power off bee ridge near 75 but i've got a river flowing in through my back doors. we didn't get water in from ian- def underestimated debbie.

Wesley chapel has been bad! 20 years in the area and 25 in Florida and This has been stronger than many hurricanes we had before. We are inland in a no flood zone but there is flood in a lot of places Tons of rain and wind gusts.
I agree! I did not expect this much rain and definitely didn’t expect it to last this long. This tropical storm really caught me off guard!
to eveyone I think. It has definetelly being bad for our area. Be safe! 🙏🏻
you too! 🙏🏽
I’ve been out 3 times back-washing (lowering) the water level in my pool. With these continuous downpours, I may have to do it again, so no sleep here.
doing the same here in Pinellas. 5 times so far.
same here. I just finished with mine AGAIN not long ago.
lowered ours twice!
same here.
Spring hill, heavy rain and wind pounding at my windows. 🙄
These winds are insane over here in Holiday right now! No rain, just crazzzy winds! *On the west side of 19*
Crazy storms in Sarasota!
I thought it would be over by now. I can’t sleep
same same in Bradenton here
I should have taken a nap today 😁 ... can't sleep with the wind gusting & rain!
me three 😬
me too 😬
you are not alone!
me 4
The water levels in my backyard (north Sarasota) are as high as they were with Irma.
crazy amount of rain. Ian was scary as hell, but I don’t think we had this much rain.😞
Scary wind in Crystal River.
yea it’s so bad 😢

Crazy wind bands in Carrollwood area.
Between that, the planes now flying out overhead, and the frogs all chatting it up in the swamp out back, there’s no sleep to be found tonight.
yes just had to take my dog outside. The frogs!!🐸
Heavy wind gusts and rain here in Sarasota.

I know we have a lot of rain with widespread flooding and high winds. I think that as we have heard a bout the 80 degree gulf water . I am thankful that this wasn’t that bad. I will take this hands down.
Heavy bands still in Palmetto, also. Just when I think it's over, another one comes sweeping in.
Same here south of Downtown St. Pete
same here in Sarasota. I can’t sleep!
same!
Same in LWR!
Our road is a river here in Sarasota 🤯
Still have power in Citrus Springs where I am. Rain and high winds...of course the dogs have to pee.
What about Leon county In Tallahassee

In Nokomis, the winds and rain keep coming and coming.. then the weather alerts keep you awake. One time it is flood warnings and now tornado alerts. Computer backup keeps clicking on and off. Storm began about 7:30 yesterday morning and simply has not stopped. Higher winds gusts began at nightfall, of course.. Keep safe everyone - 🙏🙏🙏💕
we have a house in Nokomis but are not there . Is it really bad ?

Just woke up to no power here in valrico/dover. We have been here since 2008 and have been through many hurricanes and tropical storms and in my opinion this one by far is the worst one….I don’t want to hurricane anymore 👎, anytime Debby wants to leave is fine with me lol
it definitely worse that I had expected.
me too!

I know it’s kinda hard to see but this is Redington Beach like 3 hrs ago! The street is flooded. We have water that keeps seeping into my room. I’m using a shop vac every 30 mins or so at this point thankfully but earlier it was every 5 mins or so. This storm is not to be taken lightly.
Followers: please listen to Denis and the other meteorologists!! Please. Don’t find yourself in a dangerous situation because you decided not to listen! Take care!

Been without power since 10.36pm and it is sweltering in our home without AC or any fans going. How can anyone survive in Florida without AC in the summer here? When will they send out crews to fix the power when we still have tremendous wind gusts and rain still going on?

i use battery operated fans and cooling towels...
So, where are you?
Be safe!🙏👍
Dunedin on Overcash Dr
Waited for Debbie all day, now she wants to show up drunk in the middle of the night 🤦🏻‍♀️🤦🏻‍♀️🤣🤣
How safe is that for people going to work today ?

Thank you Dennis for all you do. I am trying to compare surge numbers to Idalia and the other two storms that flooded my house and other neighbors here in Redington. Right now we are ok. The next big high tide is around 3pm. Any thoughts? It looks like if we stay below 3.5ft we are ok. Any thoughts?
The wind and rain all night was loud and relentless! Debby seems to be a scorned woman!!! 😂
hey Lori!!! lol I was knocked out last night, I keep 2 fans on so I can’t hear the wind when I sleep lol now my power is out! Had to take a last min dat at work lol so glad it’s electronic now lol 😆
I never lost power thank goodness!! I am glad yours is back!! 🥰🥰
yeah it’s back now finally! I was starting to get a little warm lol
yes she is...believe me😂 Hunker down!
But the real question is, How many diet Dr Pepper’s have you drank so far??
Love you all too!! Stay safe!!!
too many..lol we are fine here so far. ❤️
BAHAH! Heather, I love you 😍
Praying for everyone in the path when it makes landfall. This was the worst tropical storm and I can’t even imagine the aftermath now that it’s strengthened. 🙏
Bad storms and heavy wind here in Venice
Venice Pier winds are still cranking. Surprised!
it was definitely one strong tropical storm
here too in Bradenton. This is worse than the cat 4 I've seen
yes! I couldn’t believe how it looked outside. The howling of the wind and stuff banging around outside. 😬😬
it bent the flag pole in half and the flooding is awful
What is the forecast for the Tampa Bay area. Not the Carolinas
Howard Frankland bridge northbound has got surf spray blasting across three lanes at the rocks on each end. I might’ve even seen some fish in the roadway 😳
it was still open?!
yes. I made two trips over this evening 4 hours apart. There’s a trooper parked in the far right lane monitoring things.
Well living in mobile home it always sounds worse. North Lakeland definitely getting hit hard
Is Polk still on tornado warning ?
No, I believe a Tornado Watch until 6am
yes they just announced it

they just announced we’re back under it
But who knows
This is all over the place
We heard the tornado at 2am in my area
Believe me, i have gotten zero sleep. I too live in North Lakeland in a mobile home. Honestly, i am ready for all of it to be over. Praying 🙏 for you and your family to stay safe.
same it’s definitely scary
Thank you! It sure is.
Just got home from work and thankfully it wasn't to bad in Spring Hill. Lots of leaves down and small branches but didn't see anything big or flooding.
Its realy misable when my dog won't settle down know something wrong.and it's getting very muggy in my house without electric.
Road conditions?? New port richey
I moved from the Tampa Bay Area right into the eye of this storm and also last year's storm. For some reason this one seams stronger then a cat one storm.
Crap…..gonna go right on top of my son in Charleston….. 🙏🙏🙏
Winds and rain just started all over again Sarasota
yup. Here in SRQ and can’t sleep.
yes, it sure did! Stay safe.
any flooding over the seawall near Marina Jacks? Or just rain?

Seriously…
Crazy & relentless…
Raining so hard…..
haven't heard.
Thanks for all of your hard work!! Coming down pretty hard in Beverly Hills (Citrus)
Thank you both! It's just after midnight up here. Trying to keep up with Denis and his awesome reporting ❤️❤️❤️
my parents are in Citrus Springs on East side of 41. I'm on a cruise in Alaska right now. Still have electric? How bad are the winds?
in citrus springs heavy rain and wind but all is well. Electric went out for 2 seconds and back on.
I’m in citrus springs. Close to 41 and country club. Still have electricity. Very windy… says gusts up to 43 right now.
pretty windy the last hour. Calming down now
Thank you for the update! Getting lots of rain and significant wind gusts here in Wimauma.
it's scary
Just lost our power in Dade City, sounds crazy windy right now
y'all doing okay?
yes! Power came back on at 5am
thank goodness!
Power is down on siesta. It’s time for this thing to end.
Prayers 🙏 🙏 🙏 thank you for keeping us updated 🙏 ❤️
Heavy bands in Ocala just woke me up🥴
It's 2:55 am & I'm up. The rain & wind are so loud in Zephyrhills I can't sleep. Thanks for keeping us updated. Love all your info you always provide. Can definately see a nap today. Lol
Yah rain and wind are heavy over here in Lithia . Can’t sleep
me too! Ughh
same here.
Jackie, my poor cat is going nuts. She wants to go out so bad but then she freaks out when I open the door so she can look outside . She's so confused.
poor thing. Mine is doing fine and I didn't let him out all day.
Debby definitely packed a punch 😑
The winds and rain have been crazy in Bradenton
Yes still awake —-Recently in the past hr. heard a band or two go through our area.—It is bad— a little more intense than our norm summer rain storms.
Worried about my daughter and 2 grandchild in mobile home in Lutz. Anyone here from Lutz?
Still crazy in Sarasota!
Yes it sure is!
Still heavy rain in plant city off sam-allen
Finally got My Dogs out. Wow the Wind really picked up it was scary. Holiday
Raining heavy in Citrus County right now.
I’m here in Perry Florida. It’s starting to rev up.
and yall haven't even fully recovered from the last one! Hang in there ❤️
🌹ty
Perry didn’t need this. Prayers for everyone’s safety.
thank you, waiting for power to be restored
Good morning Dennis thank you for the information. Stay safe!!
I had a feeling this was going to be bad. All my hurricane shutters are closed. I still have PTSD from Ian.
Pinellas park to much rains and Scary winds 😢🙏🏻
